testcase.name: Successful login with a registered user
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Login page and the header is "Swag Labs"...........passed When user logs in with test data from row 0 in CSV file "e2e_test_data.csv".passed And the user clicks the Login button........................................passed Then the user should be redirected to the Product page and the header is "Swag Labs".passed

testcase.name: Unsuccessful login with a locked out user
testcase.system-out: Given the user is on the Login page and the header is "Swag Labs"...........passed When user logs in with test data from row 1 in CSV file "e2e_test_data.csv".passed And the user clicks the Login button........................................passed Then the system must show an error message saying "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.".passed
